message:
🌱 clickhouse: [RFC] Table Engine with Unique Key support (#1105)

* 🌱 Add clickhouse: [RFC] Table Engine with Unique Key support mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix accuracy: UniqueMergeTree RFC was never merged (clickhouse#41817)

- Changed status from "completed" to "proposed" since PR #44534 was
  closed without merging
- Removed broken pr URL from sourceUrls
- Updated resolution summary to accurately note the RFC was proposed
  but the implementation was not accepted upstream

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

+  "mission": {
+    "title": "clickhouse: [RFC] Table Engine with Unique Key support",
+    "description": "[RFC] Table Engine with Unique Key support. Requested by 19+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "proposed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current clickhouse setup",
+        "description": "Verify your clickhouse version and configuration:\n```bash\nclickhouse-client --version\n```\nThis feature requires a working clickhouse installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review clickhouse configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant clickhouse configuration:\n## Motivation\nReal-time updates have a large number of application scenarios: like order scene, row level deduplication etc. \n\nCurrently, in ClickHouse, we can use `ReplacingMergeTree` to meet this request somehow."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [RFC] Table Engine with Unique Key support",
+        "description": "### Changelog category (leave one):\n- New Feature\n\n### Changelog entry (a user-readable short description of the changes that goes to CHANGELOG.md):\nAdd new table engine UniqueMergeTree.  Closes #41817.\n\nSyntax:\n```sql\nCREATE TABLE [IF NOT EXISTS] [db.]table_name [ON CLUSTER cluster]\n(\n    name1 [type1] [DEFAULT|MATERIALIZED|ALIAS expr1],\n    name2 [type2] [DEFAULT|MATERIALIZED|ALIAS expr2],\n    ...\n) ENGINE = UniqueMergeTree([ver])\n[PARTITION BY expr]\n[ORDER BY expr]\n[PRIMARY KEY expr]\n[UNIQUE\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"[RFC] Table Engine with Unique Key support\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This RFC proposed a new UniqueMergeTree table engine using mark-delete + insert for real-time upsert semantics with better read performance than ReplacingMergeTree. An implementation was submitted in PR #44534 but was closed without being merged. The feature remains an unmerged proposal. Users needing unique key deduplication should continue using ReplacingMergeTree with FINAL or the newer lightweight DELETE functionality.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
